title: Rings
description: A simple mod of rings for casual events.
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/51d000f5eec1453c09d1ace9c32bec8439443eb9.webp)

This mod introduces three unique rings to your Minecraft world: two wearable and one non-wearable. Whether you’re looking for a simple accessory or a decorative item, these rings are perfect for adding a touch of style to your game.

# ✅ Features:

Wearable Rings: Stylish rings that your character can wear. Perfect for personalizing your in-game appearance.
Non-Wearable Ring: A decorative ring that can be used for crafting or as a special item in events.
Simple Crafting Recipes: Both rings are easy to craft, using common materials found in the game.
Event Use: The rings can be used for casual events, role-playing scenarios, or just as a fun item to share with friends.

# 📖 Usage

Crafting and using these rings is straightforward. Simply follow the crafting recipes, and you'll have your rings ready in no time. The wearable ring can be equipped directly, while the non-wearable ring can be used as a decorative item or in crafting.

# 🪓 Crafting
Ring item

![ring item](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/221b26e3741625e04bd1922809686d35273ddff0.webp)

Diamond Ring

![diamond ring](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5a1fe5a0e45e92a2f857f9e94d26741ec189e83a.webp)

Golden Ring

![golden ring](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/452a8a4caf99b25188a3da314e488a5caa3d888c.webp)


### Why download?

If you want to add a bit of flair to your Minecraft world with minimal effort, this mod is for you. The wearable ring lets you personalize your character, while the non-wearable ring offers additional crafting possibilities or can be used as a unique item for in-game events.
